name: QA 1633
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1633

Exercise the pcp-ss(1) command using an archive



Copyright (c) 2021 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu1804-container reproduce

Exercise the pcp-ss(1) command using an archive

Copyright (c) 2021 Red Hat.

To reproduce this test, please run:

Exercise the pcp-ss(1) command using an archive
